must_find.description: Command injection: branch_name is interpolated into sh -c command string without sanitization; use Command::arg() instead
Command injection: commit message is interpolated into sh -c command string without sanitization; use Command::arg() instead

must_not_flag.description: fetch_remote correctly uses Command::new('git').arg() with separate arguments, avoiding shell interpolation
current_branch uses Command::arg() safely and takes no user-controlled input for the git arguments
